rules.rule_text:
rule SmallNet
{
	meta:
		author = " Kevin Breen <kevin@techanarchy.net>"
		date = "2014/04"
		ref = "http://malwareconfig.com/stats/SmallNet"
		maltype = "Remote Access Trojan"
		filetype = "exe"

	strings:
		$split1 = "!!<3SAFIA<3!!"
		$split2 = "!!ElMattadorDz!!"
		$a1 = "stub_2.Properties"
		$a2 = "stub.exe" wide
		$a3 = "get_CurrentDomain"

	condition:
		($split1 or $split2 ) and ( all of ( $a* ) )
}
